source: ESPN / Opta Analyst / Yahoo Sports / MLB.com

data.value: The Dodgers' +230 odds are the shortest World Series preseason odds in 20 years. Added outfielder Kyle Tucker to an already loaded lineup featuring Ohtani, Betts, and Freeman. Pursuing an unprecedented three-peat.

Seattle represents strong value with one of baseball's most elite starting rotations — Bryan Woo, Logan Gilbert, and George Kirby among the most efficient strikeout-to-walk pitchers in modern MLB history.
The 2025 AL champions added Dylan Cease to the rotation after a near-miss World Series run, making them one of the most complete teams in the AL heading into 2026.
Detroit is a genuine World Series dark horse. Back-to-back Cy Young winner Tarik Skubal now paired with ace Framber Valdez gives the Tigers a playoff rotation that can match any team in baseball.
Phillies' odds drifted from 13-1 to 14-1 due to uncertainty around ace Zack Wheeler's status heading into spring training. Wheeler's health is the single biggest question mark.
Yankees' odds lengthened from +850 to +950 this offseason reflecting rotation depth concerns. The pitching lacks depth and the lineup has meaningful question marks outside of Aaron Judge.
At least one prominent ESPN analyst made the bold prediction that the Orioles will win the 2026 World Series, citing their young core coming into its prime and improved pitching.
